canonical_answer: At 2s, a woman in a pink sports bra adjusts her hair with hands behind her head; at 8s, another woman raises her arms above her head near a yellow net; at 12s, a woman adjusts the straps of her pink top; at 18s, a person in a pink top starts running on the green field.
